## Documentation Issue

### Location

Which document(s) are affected?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] QUICK_START.md
- [ ] PUBLISHING.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

### Issue Type

- [ ] Typo or grammatical error
- [ ] Incorrect or outdated information
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing example
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Description

A clear description of the documentation issue:

## Current Content

If applicable, quote the current documentation content:

```
Paste current content here
```

## Suggested Improvement

Provide your suggestion for how to improve the documentation:

```
Paste suggested content here
```

## Additional Context

- Why is this change important?
- What confusion did the current documentation cause?
- Are there related sections that should also be updated?

## Affected Users

Who would benefit from this documentation improvement?
- [ ] New users getting started
- [ ] Experienced users
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] All users
